title: Your automation has failed due to an authorization issue

posts.author: marionmc (Marion)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I am contacting you as a very simple automation fails with the message “your automation has failed due to an authorization issue” although I am both the owner and admin of my board.

Furthermore, the automation is very simple: When item has this status, move to this group.

Has anyone faced this issue? What is this failing due to ?

Many thanks for your help!
Marion

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marion,

Sorry you’re running into this error message!

Can you try duplicating the recipe and testing the behaviour again? If you build out a new recipe, does the same error persist?
